title: GapAnalysisReport
description: Output of Agent C - Gap Analysis. Root object wrapping all gap findings for one regulation run.

run_id.description: Matches context_packet_id from Agent A output (e.g. CTX-001)

generated_at.description: UTC timestamp of when Agent C produced this file

regulation_source.description: Relative path to the source regulation file

jurisdiction.description: Jurisdiction inherited from context_packet (e.g. EU, US, UK)

gap_summary.description: Counts by severity and by status for quick dashboard display

policy_area.description: Compliance domain this gap belongs to

gap_status.description: Non-compliant = direct conflict; Partial = some coverage; Needs Review = ambiguous; Compliant = no gap

severity.description: Risk severity if gap is not closed before effective_date

confidence.description: Claude's confidence in the gap assessment (not extraction confidence)

gap_description.description: Plain-language explanation of exactly what is missing or misaligned

EvidencePointer.description: Mandatory traceable evidence — every finding must link back to a source paragraph. Auditors use source_quote to verify without re-reading the full document.

source_file.description: Relative path to original regulation file

source_quote.description: Verbatim excerpt from the regulation — the exact text that triggered this finding

content_hash.description: SHA-256 prefix of source_quote for tamper detection

recommended_action.description: Concrete step to close the gap (fed into remediation_plan.md by Agent H)

suggested_owner.description: Team or role best placed to execute

target_deadline.description: 30 days before effective_date — hard implementation target

HumanOversight.description: Flags findings that require human SME review before remediation. open_questions are routed to legal/compliance for interpretation.

review_required.description: true whenever confidence < 0.80 or regulatory language is ambiguous

review_reason.description: One sentence explaining why a human must review this finding

open_questions.description: Legal/regulatory questions that need SME input before remediation can proceed

flagged_ambiguities.description: Exact phrases from the regulation text that are vague or open to interpretation
